{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063842AF5ED50A53900D2F1684"}"},"total":24133},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7124737704918713101","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"满不错的这本书，9.5分它当之无愧，只不过前几章专业术语一大堆，对这方面没点研究是真看不懂，本来看小说时我常是不带脑看，现在是带上了脑也看不懂，不过到后面就好很多了，通俗易懂，作者文笔也还不错 ，个人来讲还是很喜欢的，当然如果能把男主与女主的关系捋清楚点就完美了，明明有女主但却把她当路人来写，着让人看着着急，但也正是这点使得男主的性格形象更为符后描述了，总的来说还是很不错的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658857644,"group_id":"7087382316862934024","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"转职的舰长成为孤独旅者，在兜兜转转之间又回到了那崩坏的世界。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4Upz2fHuRl//Onm9Kw+N+9n/Pv7JZwiyB+eJSWizmbi","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/42111ca1b57d45c4a9d7f6d19300333e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705997&x-signature=saR5lkKnQwf7SHPOcHN5Vd4YWtM%3D","user_id":"4367702820914872","user_name":"君观砚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4367702820914872","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7087382316862934024","book_info":{"abstract":"【科技+灾难+星际+科技树】
公元历2050年，太阳受到未知影响，氦闪即将爆发！
地球危在旦夕？
无所谓，我会出手！
三体星系，比邻星文明即将入侵？
无所谓，我会出手！
黑暗宇宙，高等文明纷争四起？
无所谓，我会出手！
……
从可控核聚变开始，主角吕永昌开启人类文明星际时代！
空天飞机，太空电梯，能量武器，反物质制备，大统一理论，曲率航行，二维碎片（二向箔）……
甲烷海洋，神秘物种！
液氨星球，肉体聚变！！
维度生物，降维打击！！！
无尽宇宙中，到底有什么值得探索的奥秘？！
高等文明的纷争，人类文明该如何自处？！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5b6f797a5b073f2847132e6acb8dda25","author":"陈二懒","author_id":"","book_id":"7087382316862934024","book_name":"我一个二级文明有二向箔很合理吧","book_short_name":"深空灾变","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"12.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7087463707302691360","read_count":"123998","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2012655"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"987","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,末世,求生,星际,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e888045c6c653e1e8926c50de6f970b1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316722&x-signature=9f1u%2FXZH%2BB1qtAgR1S8eu7R9l4c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99481636741","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.6781376e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063842AF5ED50A53900D2F1684"}"},"relate_info_list":[]
